sent_simp: 她在群里跟大家说“安安”。
sent_trad: 她在群裡跟大家說「安安」。
pinyin: Tā zài qún lǐ gēn dàjiā shuō “ān'ān”.
english: She greeted everyone with 'an'an' in the group chat.
This word refers specifically to written language.

sent_simp: 神马都是浮云，别太在意。
sent_trad: 神馬都是浮雲，別太在意。
pinyin: Shénmǎ dōu shì fúyún, bié tài zàiyì.
english: Whatever—it's all fleeting, don't mind it too much.
